message:
refactor: Further DRY simplifications to runtime.zig

- Simplify contains(): 22→7 lines (compact switch expression)
- Simplify pyLen(): 11→8 lines (inline switch)
- Simplify pyObjEqInt()/pyObjToInt(): 14→4 lines (inline conditionals)
- Simplify pyObjToBigInt(): 13→9 lines (switch + cast helper)

runtime.zig: 1517 → 1485 lines (32 lines removed)
Total reduction from original: 2565 → 1485 lines (~42%)
